name: GH_ProcessStep
summary: Enumerates all possible solution states in which the document can be.

enum_values.name: PreProcess
enum_values.summary: The document is ready for a new solution

enum_values.name: Process
enum_values.summary: The document is currently calculating a new solution, no changes are allowed during this phase

enum_values.name: PostProcess
enum_values.summary: The document has completed a solution, and nothing has changed since.

enum_values.name: Aborted
enum_values.summary: The last solution has been aborted before it reached completion.
